title: evolvulus rufus
intro: Evolvulus rufus, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus rufus include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its herbal preparations.
